headline: Equifax and GBG Expand Global Partnership
summary: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX), a global data, analytics, and technology company, and GBG (LSE: GBG), a global identity and location technology business, are expanding their partnership into the United States and strengthening the power of their identity and fraud protection offerings globally. As part of this expanded relationship, Equifax Identity and Fraud solutions will be integrated into GBG's adaptive identity platform, GBG Go. This will enable more businesses to leverage proprietary Equifax data to
